steps.title: Find the shared feature
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize a similarity between Cane and Billy Budd, Sailor. The notes show that both works entered the public domain recently, with Cane doing so in 2019 and Billy Budd, Sailor doing so in 2020.

steps.title: Reject contrasts and narrow focus
steps.content: Choice A uses unlike, so it emphasizes a difference in timing rather than the shared public-domain status. Choice C discusses only Billy Budd, Sailor. Choice D contrasts genre, saying one work is a novel and the other is a novella.

steps.title: Group the two works
steps.content: The sentence that names both works together and says they recently entered the public domain directly uses the relevant notes to highlight what the two works have in common. The answer is B.
